title: Environmental
summary: 9609 A Level — sustainability, regulation, and climate impacts on business.
learningObjectives: Analyse costs and benefits of green policies.

simpleExplanation.title: Planet and profit
simpleExplanation.summary: Climate change, pollution controls, and consumer demand for sustainability force firms to adapt processes and products.

sections.content: **Environmental PESTLE** (6.1.7) completes **6.1**. Tie to **4.1.2 sustainability** in operations essays.
